title: Leucanthemella

taxonomy: Leucanthemella is a genus of flowering plants in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It contains four species of annual and perennial plants, primarily found in Europe and Asia. The genus is closely related to Chrysanthemum and is often considered a subgenus within that group. Leucanthemella plants are known for their small, white or pink flowers and are often used as ornamental plants. The classification of Leucanthemella is part of the larger taxonomic classification of the Asteraceae family.
